Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Experience the tactical intensity of the World Pickleball League as the Rajasthan Titans look to mount a comeback against the surging Hyderabad Superstars. This episode spotlights a generational clash in the men's singles match between Rajasthan’s Jack Foster and Hyderabad’s Marcelo Jardim, a 51-year-old former world No. 3 in padel and a true legend of racquet sports.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: Check out these US Open Pickleball Championship 2023 highlights!
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 11, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 11, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: YouTuber Danny Duncan teams up with Pickleball pro Anna Leigh Waters in a match against Pickleball pro Leigh Waters & teammate, former NFL quarterback Connor Shaw.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: Get the behind-the-scenes look of the pickleball court construction process with the Court Kings crew Lonnie "Hurricane" Anger, Alex "Mufasa" Lanzetta, Paul "Gucci" Roschfska and Jerry "Cruise" Duncan.
Video.title: Court Kings - Part 1

Image.alt: Court Kings - Part 1
Court Kings - Part 1
Court Kings - Part 1

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
